translations.de: Heute bleibst du in der Abwehr.
translations.vi: Hôm nay em chơi phòng thủ.
translations.nl: Vandaag blijf je in de verdediging.
translations.nb: I dag blir du i forsvar.
translations.id: Hari ini kamu bermain di pertahanan.
translations.sv: I dag stannar du i försvar.
translations.da: I dag bliver du i forsvaret.
translations.ja: 今日はディフェンスをやる。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular, agreeing with ‘tu’.
Preposition introducing the noun phrase ‘défense’, expressing position/state.
Common noun (fem. sg.); object of the preposition ‘en’ (sports context: on defense).
Temporal adverb specifying when the action takes place.

sentences.target: Pour ma défense, j'étais coincé dans le métro.
sentences.reading: /puʁ ma defɑ̃s ʒetɛ kwɛ̃se dɑ̃ lə metʁo/

translations.fr: Pour ma défense, j'étais coincé dans le métro.
translations.ipa: /puʁ ma defɑ̃s ʒetɛ kwɛ̃se dɑ̃ lə metʁo/
translations.en: In my defense, I was stuck in the subway.
translations.es: En mi defensa, estaba atrapado en el metro.
translations.de: Zu meiner Verteidigung war ich in der U-Bahn stecken geblieben.
translations.it: A mia discolpa, ero bloccato in metropolitana.
translations.zh-Hans: 为我自己辩解一下，我在地铁里被困住了。
translations.yue: 為我自己辯解一下，我喺地鐵度困住咗。
translations.ru: В оправдание скажу, что я застрял в метро.
translations.pt: Em minha defesa, eu fiquei preso no metrô.
translations.tr: Kendimi savunmak gerekirse, metroda sıkışıp kaldım.
translations.vi: Để biện minh, tôi bị kẹt trong tàu điện ngầm.
translations.nl: Ter mijn verdediging zat ik vast in de metro.
translations.uk: На свій захист скажу, що я застряг у метро.
translations.hu: Mentségemre szóljon, hogy elakadtam a metrón.
translations.hi: अपनी सफाई में, मैं मेट्रो में फँस गया था.
translations.pl: Na swoją obronę powiem, że utknąłem w metrze.
translations.el: Για την υπεράσπισή μου, είχα κολλήσει στο μετρό.
translations.nb: Til mitt forsvar var jeg fast i T-banen.
translations.id: Sebagai pembelaan, aku terjebak di kereta bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Till mitt försvar fastnade jag i tunnelbanan.
translations.ro: În apărarea mea, am rămas blocat în metrou.
translations.cs: Na svou obranu dodám, že jsem uvízl v metru.
translations.da: Til mit forsvar sad jeg fast i metroen.
translations.ja: 言い訳すると、地下鉄で立ち往生していた。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing the adjunct ‘pour ma défense’ (in my defense).
1st-person possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘défense’.
Common noun (fem. sg.); complement of ‘pour’ in the PP ‘pour ma défense’.
Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular subject.
Copular/auxiliary verb, imparfait (past imperfect), 1st person singular, linking to the predicate ‘coincé’.
Predicate adjective (past participle used adjectivally), masculine singular, describing the subject’s state.
Preposition introducing the locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘métro’.
Common noun (masc. sg.); object of the preposition ‘dans’ indicating location.

sentences.target: Il prépare sa défense pour demain.

translations.fr: Il prépare sa défense pour demain.
translations.en: He is preparing his defense for tomorrow.
translations.es: Está preparando su defensa para mañana.
translations.de: Er bereitet seine Verteidigung für morgen vor.
translations.it: Sta preparando la sua difesa per domani.
translations.ko: 그는 내일을 위해 변론을 준비하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他正在准备明天的辩护。
translations.ru: Он готовит свою защиту на завтра.
translations.pt: Ele está preparando sua defesa para amanhã.
translations.he: הוא מכין את ההגנה שלו למחר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang chuẩn bị phần bào chữa cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Hij bereidt zijn verdediging voor morgen.
translations.uk: Він готує свій захист на завтра.
translations.hi: वह कल के लिए अपना बचाव तैयार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ετοιμάζει την υπεράσπισή του για αύριο.
translations.nb: Han forbereder forsvaret sitt til i morgen.
translations.id: Dia sedang menyiapkan pembelaannya untuk besok.
translations.sv: Han förbereder sitt försvar till i morgon.
translations.da: Han forbereder sit forsvar til i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は明日の弁護の準備をしている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular subject pronoun (masc.), subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, taking a direct object.
3rd-person possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘défense’.
Common noun (fem. sg.); direct object of ‘prépare’.
Preposition introducing a temporal/goal complement indicating deadline.
Temporal adverb functioning as complement of ‘pour’ (deadline/time frame).

sentences.target: Défense de toucher à mon gâteau.

translations.fr: Défense de toucher à mon gâteau.
translations.vi: Đừng đụng vào bánh của tôi.
translations.ja: 私のケーキに触らないで。

tokens.explanation: Common noun used formulaically to express a ban (‘Défense de + infinitif’).
Preposition linking the head noun ‘défense’ to the infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb as complement of ‘défense de …’, expressing the prohibited action.
Preposition selected by ‘toucher’ in the construction ‘toucher à [N]’.
1st-person possessive determiner, masculine singular, determiner of ‘gâteau’.
Common noun (masc. sg.); object of the preposition ‘à’ in the ‘toucher à’ construction.
